items.title: Personal Database
items.description: Flask-based personal knowledge base with tags, search, and file uploads.
items.content:
A lightweight SQLite-backed personal DB for notes, bookmarks, ideas, and references.

Features:
- Full-text search across title, description, and content
- Tag system with auto-creation
- File uploads with type detection
- Web UI for CRUD operations

Tech: Flask, SQLite, Jinja2

Key files:
- app.py (Flask routes)
- database.py (SQLite layer)
- templates/ (Jinja2 HTML)
- static/ (CSS/JS)

Runs on localhost:5123

items.title: Prompt-to-CAD
items.description: CLI tool that turns natural language into executable CAD models using a fine-tuned vision-language model.
items.content:
Pipeline:
1. User types a text prompt
2. Qwen3-VL-2B (Zero-To-CAD fine-tuned) generates CadQuery Python code
3. Sandboxed executor validates and runs the code
4. Renderer exports STL, STEP, SVG, and PNG views

Key files:
- generate.py (CLI entry)
- model.py (model loading & generation)
- executor.py (sandboxed code execution with whitelist)
- renderer.py (STL/STEP export + matplotlib/trimesh rendering)

Tech: Python, PyTorch, Transformers, CadQuery, trimesh, matplotlib

GitHub: https://github.com/Blueshadow0107/prompt-to-cad

Notes:
- Model has a weird inspect.signature preamble tic
- Avoid the word "cylinder" in prompts (hallucinates function calls)
- Success rate ~70% for simple mechanical parts, ~0% for mugs/consumer objects

items.title: Minecraft Modding
items.description: Build Minecraft mods using Forge/Fabric. Custom blocks, items, mobs, dimensions, and game mechanics.
items.content:
Future project idea:
- Mod loader: Forge or Fabric (Fabric is lighter for small mods)
- Language: Java + Gradle
- IDE: IntelliJ IDEA
- Possible features:
  * Custom blocks with unique properties
  * New tools/weapons with special abilities
  * Dimension generation
  * Mob AI behaviors
  * Integration with CadQuery for block model design?

Note: Could potentially bridge with the prompt-to-cad project for procedural block model generation.

References:
- Fabric wiki: https://fabricmc.net/wiki/
- Forge docs: https://docs.minecraftforge.net/
- Yarn mappings for deobfuscation

items.title: Hyprland Rice
items.description: Personal Hyprland desktop configuration docs and wallpaper scripts.
items.content:
Based on JaKooLit's Hyprland-Dots.

Helper scripts:
- download-purple-wallpapers.sh (purple/space/cyberpunk)
- download-blue-ocean-wallpapers.sh (dark-blue/ocean)

Actual configs live in ~/.config/hypr/ and ~/.config/waybar/.

items.title: Sonic Pi Compositions
items.description: Live-coded music using Sonic Pi (Ruby DSL).
items.content:
15 pieces in compositions/*.rb — tutorials + thematic tracks.

Audio backend: JACK / PipeWire (using pw-jack bridge).

Run: sonic-pi-fix.sh kills stale JACK and launches Sonic Pi.

items.description: Manim animation scripts for a math education series. Vertical 1080×1920 @ 60fps.
items.content:
Episodes:
- Plus sign
- Minus sign
- Multiplication sign
- Division sign
- Equals sign

Workflow: Manim → Kdenlive → narration sync → upload.

One hardcoded asset path: /home/cyanidepopcorn/Projects/utube_assets/recorde.jpg

Known issue: widmann.jpg is 0 bytes (unfinished).

items.title: Pokémon pokeemerald-expansion
items.description: GBA ROM hack dev framework based on pret's pokeemerald decompilation.
items.content:
Massive C + ARM asm codebase (~69K files).

Build commands:
  make -j$(nproc)
  make check
  make debug

Key areas: src/ (battle, overworld, UI, audio), include/config/ (feature toggles).

Branch strategy: master (stable), upcoming (new features).
